message: fix: restore full gate after web-search rebase

files.patch:

+        credentialPath: "tools.web.search.custom.apiKey",
         autoDetectOrder: 1,
         credentialPath: "tools.web.search.custom.apiKey",
         getCredentialValue: () => "configured",
